Title: Valid login with correct credentials
Preconditions: Registered user exists: user@example.com / CorrectPassword123!. Login page is open.
Steps: 1. Enter user@example.com | 2. Enter CorrectPassword123! | 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Login is successful; no error message is shown; a user session is created.

Title: Error shown for incorrect password
Preconditions: Registered user exists. Login page is open.
Steps: 1. Enter user@example.com | 2. Enter WrongPassword! | 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Login fails and an incorrect password error message is displayed.

Title: No session or redirect on incorrect password
Preconditions: Registered user exists. Login page is open.
Steps: 1. Enter user@example.com | 2. Enter BadPassword123 | 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Login fails; no session is created; user is not redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Error shown for unregistered email
Preconditions: Email unknown@example.com is not registered. Login page is open.
Steps: 1. Enter unknown@example.com | 2. Enter any password | 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Login fails and an unregistered email error message is displayed.

Title: No session or redirect for unregistered email
Preconditions: Email nobody@example.com is not registered. Login page is open.
Steps: 1. Enter nobody@example.com | 2. Enter CorrectPassword123! | 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Login fails; no session is created; no redirect happens.

Title: Form stays enabled after 4 failed attempts
Preconditions: Registered user exists. Login page is open.
Steps: 1. Enter valid email | 2. Enter wrong password | 3. Click Login four times consecutively
Expected Result: All four attempts fail, but the login form remains enabled.

Title: Form is disabled on 5th failed attempt
Preconditions: Registered user exists. Login page is open.
Steps: 1. Enter valid email | 2. Enter wrong password | 3. Click Login five times consecutively
Expected Result: The 5th failed attempt disables the login form.

Title: Disabled form blocks further login attempts
Preconditions: Login form is already disabled after 5 failed attempts.
Steps: 1. Enter valid credentials after lockout | 2. Try to submit the form again
Expected Result: Submission is blocked; login does not succeed; no session is created; no redirect occurs.

Title: Successful login resets failed-attempt counter
Preconditions: Registered user exists. Login page is open.
Steps: 1. Fail login 4 times with wrong password | 2. Log in once with correct password | 3. Attempt login again with wrong password
Expected Result: The final failed attempt does not disable the form because the counter was reset.

Title: Successful login redirects to dashboard
Preconditions: Registered user exists. Login page is open.
Steps: 1. Enter valid email and correct password | 2. Click Login
Expected Result: Login is successful and the user is redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Remember Me keeps session for 30 days
Preconditions: Registered user exists. Login page is open.
Steps: 1. Enter valid credentials | 2. Check Remember Me | 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Login is successful and a persistent session is created for 30 days.

Title: Without Remember Me
Steps: Registered user exists. Login page is open.
Expected Result: 1. Enter valid credentials | 2. Leave Remember Me unchecked | 3. Click Login
column6: Login is successful, but the session is not given 30-day persistence.

Title: Password field masks typed characters
Steps: 1. Click the password field | 2. Type Secret123!
Expected Result: The entered password is displayed as masked characters, not plain text.

Title: Empty password input remains blank and masked
Steps: 1. Click the password field | 2. Leave it empty or clear all text
Expected Result: The password field remains empty and exposes no characters.

Title: Password masking works for special characters
Steps: 1. Click the password field | 2. Type P@$$w0rd!#%
Expected Result: All characters, including special characters, are masked and no raw characters are visible.
